title: Max Roach: The Drum Also Waltzes
original_title: Max Roach: The Drum Also Waltzes
overview: The Drum Waltzes explores the life and music of legendary drummer, activist Max Roach, his creative peaks, personal struggles and re-inventions from the Jim Crow to Civil Rights eras, from heady days of post-war jazz to hip hop and beyond.
